arts.ttl: Report: Chelsea's top-scoring youngster could make permanent exit today as Championship clubs consider move
arts.sum: Interest in Chelsea players is coming thick and fast as the January transfer window approaches its final few hours. Clubs continue to test the waters...

arts.ttl: Chelsea vs West Ham – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Chelsea host West Ham United on Monday night knowing a win would propel them into the top four. The Blues fell to a 3-1 defeat at Manchester City last weekend and have had nine days to reflect on the result. Chelsea’s Benoit Badiashile and Wesley Fofana are long-term absentees while Romeo Lavia is still nursing […] The post Chelsea vs West Ham – Match preview and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Chelsea target Deadline Day swoop for THREE midfielders
arts.sum: Chelsea have identified three midfield targets for a potential late Deadline Day swoop, according to Fabrizio Romano. Chelsea target Deadline Day swoop for THREE midfielders

arts.ttl: Analysis: How Potter will set up West Ham for his return to Chelsea
arts.sum: Injuries have played their part in Potter's decision-making, but it was still bold of the new head coach to start with a back three that contained just one natural central defender at Villa Park. The new Hammers head coach will need time for all his ideas to become embedded within a squad that was asked to play a very different brand of football under Julen Lopetegui and before that, David Moyes .

arts.ttl: Report: Chelsea now close to signing record breaker with £37m release clause in deadline day transfer
'I don't know': £17m player admits he's not sure if he'll be at West Ham next season
arts.sum: West Ham United have certainly been busy trying to strengthen the options available to Graham Potter for the rest of the season. James Ward-Prowse has...

arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer news: AC Milan AGREE loan deal for Joao Felix
arts.sum: The Portugal international is set to leave Stamford Bridge before the end of Deadline Day, and Milan have now ramped up talks to sign him on a temporary deal. AC Milan have reportedly reached an agreement in principle to sign Chelsea forward Joao Felix on loan for the remainder of the season.

arts.ttl: Axel Disasi 'Ready for Medical' Amid Aston Villa Pursuit
arts.sum: Chelsea are open to letting Axel Disasi join Aston Villa in the final hours of the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: West Ham: Evan Ferguson sets out targets for Hammers loan amid 'big opportunity'
arts.sum: Ferguson has joined Hammers on six-month loan deal from Brighton

arts.ttl: Man City send Chelsea 'next Cole Palmer' deadline day transfer message as secret clause revealed
arts.sum: Indeed, according to our colleagues at The Manchester Evening News, Chelsea recently approached City regarding O'Reilly's availability. O'Reilly only made his Premier League debut for Manchester City last month, coming off the subs bench in a 6-0 win over Ipswich Town at Portman Road.
